comments: Approved after reviewing the contract, review packet, execution result, and `git show --stat --name-status bae2bb9` plus the full commit diff. Commit bae2bb9 changes only README.md, README_zh-CN.md, documentation/EN/getting-started/installation.md, documentation/ZH/getting-started/installation.md, and task artifacts under tasks/v0.8-readme-npm-cleanup/. No changes were made to src/, bin/, package.json, workflow/dispatch.json, iteration-state.json, or any runtime execution code/state semantics. The documented implementation matches the execution-result artifact.
